description: Dashboard focused on processing throughput, yield, cost, and run volume using Processing Run data. Intended filters: facility_id, equipment_id, and operator_id. Equipment capacity and processing rate fields are not supplied, so output_tons, actual_yield_pct, and yield_variance_pct are used to identify efficiency gaps.

selectedEntities.description: Records of individual processing runs including inputs, outputs, costs, and yields for manufacturing facilities.
selectedEntities.label: Fact Processing Run
selectedEntities.name: scrapyard_ops__fact_processing_run

filter.sql: select distinct start_hour as value from scrapyard_ops.fact_processing_run limit 100
filter.title: Start Hour

filter.sql: select distinct movement_type as value from scrapyard_ops.fact_inventory_movement limit 100
filter.title: Movement Type
